checks.finding: Source identities, precedence, digests, consumption boundaries, inherited debts, and claim ceilings are complete and consistent.
The seven-lane scope, stable identities, ontology, projections, outputs, and stopping rules are complete and aligned.
The Markdown meaning, schema 1.1.0, twenty record shapes, relationships, and divided authority are internally consistent.
Hypotheses, controls, failure classes, terminal meanings, developmental ladders, and guarded next moves are finite and claim-safe.
Deterministic tooling, reconstruction, runtime honesty, read-only enforcement, calibration, fixtures, and 32 executable tests cover the Phase 1 infrastructure boundary.
P1-I1 through P1-I5 form one coherent executable contract.
All narrative lane projections agree with the controlling machine registry.
D-038 preserves execution-validity and claim-safety gates while treating scientific thresholds as interpretive anchors.
Positive, partial, negative, blocked, incomplete, narrow, counter-directional, resolution-limited, and unexpected Phase 2 results are representable.
No conceptual source, constructed mechanism, fixture, or tooling success has been promoted into positive evidence.
Candidate-blind calibration and lane registration can open without authorizing candidate execution.

execution_phase_follow_ups.reopening_condition: The first concrete calibration cannot provide bounded reproducible null-generator lineage without changing frozen metric or calibration meaning.
execution_phase_follow_ups.requirement: Retain calibration-input and matched-null generator provenance and verify that no candidate-derived input contributed before a frozen delta can authorize candidate execution.

execution_phase_follow_ups.reopening_condition: The first lane cannot express exact registration through the existing pattern-card, realization-profile, policy, calibration, manifest, and review surfaces.
execution_phase_follow_ups.requirement: Materialize an explicit reviewed registration evidence bundle; validate-phase1 success alone does not constitute lane registration.

execution_phase_follow_ups.reopening_condition: The first lane cannot resolve and verify mandatory control outcomes through retained artifacts and existing references without a first-class control-outcome record.
execution_phase_follow_ups.requirement: Resolve every mandatory control outcome and every applicability disposition before terminal classification; control ID references alone are insufficient.
